metadata.scenario: Cold LiveHybrid selling-plan group read and existing-resource mutation replay
notes: The proxy starts cold in parity replay; the group/product/variant context comes only from the recorded sellingPlanGroupHydrateNodes upstreamCalls entry.
The update target uses isolatedProxy so a pre-fix proxy would forward the caller mutation upstream instead of hydrating and staging locally.
